core_technical_requirements: Vector databases or hybrid search infrastructure
Evaluation frameworks for ranking systems (NDCG, MRR, MAP)
hidden_text_markers: Async-first and comfortable with heavy writing
Comfortable with ambiguity and rapid change
Systems-level thinker rather than framework enthusiast
explicit_anti_patterns: Pure research environments without production deployment
AI experience consisting primarily of recent LangChain/OpenAI wrappers without pre-LLM ML production experience
Senior engineers who have not written production code in the last 18 months
Framework enthusiasts with only demo/tutorial portfolios
Candidates with only IT consulting/services firm experience (e.g., TCS, Infosys, Wipro) without product company history
Computer vision, speech, or robotics specialists without NLP/IR exposure
Candidates with only closed-source proprietary systems experience without external validation
optional_preferred_requirements: Prior exposure to HR-tech, recruiting tech, or marketplace products
Background in distributed systems or large-scale inference optimization
Open-source contributions in the AI/ML space

availability_requirements: Active on Redrob platform or clear signal of being in the job market

algorithmic_rules.keyword_trap_mitigation_strategy: Evaluate career history and actual system-building experience over keyword matching. Disqualify candidates with keyword-stuffed profiles who lack relevant roles (e.g., Marketing Manager with AI keywords), and surface candidates who built recommendation/search systems even if they lack modern buzzwords like RAG or Pinecone.
behavioural_signals: Low platform activity (e.g., no login for 6 months)
Low recruiter response rate (e.g., 5% response rate)

synthetic_ideal_candidate_embedding_stri: I am a Senior AI Engineer with over 7 years of experience building and scaling production-grade ranking, retrieval, and recommendation systems at product-driven companies. I specialize in Python and have hands-on expertise deploying embeddings-based retrieval systems using sentence-transformers, BGE, and vector databases like Qdrant, Milvus, and Elasticsearch. I design rigorous evaluation frameworks using NDCG, MRR, and MAP to bridge offline metrics with online A/B testing. I possess a scrappy, product-first engineering mindset, prioritizing shipping working systems to gather user feedback over academic perfection. My background includes optimizing hybrid search architectures, fine-tuning LLMs using LoRA/PEFT, and working in fast-paced, async-first environments where I actively write code and collaborate closely with product teams.
